reasoning: The market price was 1% on October 16, 2025, indicating an extremely low probability. DeepSeek models, while highly cost-efficient and historically competitive (R1 in January 2025), appear to have fallen behind top competitors like OpenAI (o3), Anthropic (Claude 4.0), and Google (Gemini 2.5 Pro) by late 2025. DeepSeek was ranked 4th in June 2025, and their recent September 2025 release (V3.2-Exp) is reportedly only "on par" with their mid-2025 V3.1-Terminus. Given the dominance of Western AI labs with vast compute resources, the likelihood of DeepSeek releasing a model that reclaims the #1 overall spot on Chatbot Arena by December 31, 2025, is negligible.
